cappuccino.001.08.png: 'The important thing in life is not victory but combat; it is not to have vanquished but to have fought well.' - Pierre de Coubertin.
cappuccino.001.11.png: Today we've visited Exposition Universelle in 1889. The event actually happened in Paris between 6 May and 6 November on the same year.
cappuccino.001.14.png: An antique map of Europe, part of Asia and part of Africa, also known as the Old World before the discovery of the New World by the expeditions of Christopher Columbus between 1492 and 1504.
